title: Harness Run Context
description: Identity and provenance for a single harness workflow execution.

run_id.description: 8-char hex run identifier, unique per execution.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the run began.

completed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the run finished. Null if still running.

branch.description: Git branch name at run start.

commit_sha.description: Git commit SHA at run start.

dirty.description: True if the worktree had uncommitted changes at run start.

input_paths.description: Relative paths to source inputs consumed by this run.

input_hashes.description: Map of input path -> SHA-256 hex digest.

output_dir.description: Relative path to the run output directory under Outputs/runs/<run_id>/.

requested_proof_level.description: Minimum proof level requested for this run.

skipped_gates.description: List of proof-level gate names that were skipped.
